findings.summary: Tracked implementation diff is web UI and UI tests only; no runtime, live server, command adapter, or allowlist edits.
Compact summary and ledger row fields use safeLedgerText for response-side text and redact paths, secrets, raw argv, raw JSON, stack trace, and browser command id echoes.
Ledger rows are collapsed by default and expose an operator-readable summary line.
Refresh-required OK remains amber until refresh complete; only refresh complete becomes green.
Command error and invalid JSON are red; timeout remains amber/recoverable.
Duplicate dispatch is blocked and covered by UI-session tests.
Empty ledger, refresh-complete ledger, and sanitized command-error ledger screenshots exist and match claimed states.
